name: code-territory-guide
description: Evidence-led workflow for scoped, safe code changes across repositories and delivery stages.

interface.shortDescription: Scoped code changes and safe delivery
interface.longDescription: Guide non-trivial code changes through repository discovery, trusted-context handling, worktree ownership, scoped implementation, validation, artifacts, review, and explicitly authorized delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use Code Territory Guide to implement this change safely.
Inspect this repository and give me the smallest evidence-backed route.
